name: NIST AI RMF: MEASURE — Ongoing Tracking
description: Mechanisms are in place to track identified AI risks and system performance over time.
rationale: NIST AI RMF MEASURE 3/4: mechanisms for tracking identified AI risks over time are in place, and measurement results are monitored.

examples.fails: the required risk-management step is absent

source: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0), NIST AI 100-1, 26 Jan 2023 — voluntary framework organised around GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
